span.p: Section 335: Causing grievous hurt on provocation (eff: 1872-01-01)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: The grievous hurt is caused on grave and sudden provocation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: He neither intends to cause grievous hurt to any person other than the person...

span.p: He knows himself not to be likely to cause grievous hurt to any person other ...
